common.tagline: Predict the Cup with your crew.

landing.heroSubtitle: World Cup predictions, the way you'd play with friends. Pick every match, watch the points land on their own, and see the whole group compare live — all the way to the final.
landing.ctaPaymentNote: One-time {price} payment via Stripe — instant access.
landing.featuresTitle: A prediction game that stays clear, even as the group grows.
landing.featuresIntro: No more scores scribbled in a corner or endless debates. Lucarne brings the schedule, picks, standings and banter into one place.
landing.feature1Body: Points, group standings and qualifications update automatically with every result. No spreadsheet, no manual math.
landing.feature2Body: At kickoff, picks lock and reveal to the whole group. Compare scores, talk a little trash, see who dared what.
landing.feature3Body: Every result moves the points and the standings, live. The race for first stays readable all the way to the final.
landing.workflowTitle: Three steps and you're in the game.
landing.workflow1Body: An invite code opens the circle. Pay for access once and you're in — no subscription.
landing.workflow2Body: The score of every group match, then your bracket. Your picks compute the group standings on their own.
landing.workflow3Body: Live scores, a leaderboard that moves with every goal, and a group room to follow each match together.
landing.trustIntro: Lucarne isn't a bookmaker — it's a prediction pool among friends, free to play. The game, access and history stay clean so nobody squabbles over points.
landing.trust1Body: Picks lock at kickoff: no copying, everyone plays at the same time.
landing.trust2Body: A one-time Stripe payment unlocks access right away — no cash to chase, no approval to wait on.
landing.trust3Body: Each game stays among the people you invite. Your circle, away from prying eyes.
landing.ctaBandTitle: Claim your seat before the first whistle
landing.ctaBandSubtitle: A private circle with friends, a single {price} access, and the whole World Cup to predict. The standings update on their own, match after match.
landing.ctaBandPaymentNote: One-time {price} payment via Stripe · instant access

metadata.description: Lucarne — the private app to live the 2026 World Cup with friends: every match, live scores, news and analysis, and a friendly prediction contest.
metadata.ogTitle: Lucarne · Your private app for the 2026 World Cup
metadata.ogDescription: Private access to the 2026 World Cup: every match, live scores, news and analysis, and a prediction contest with friends.
metadata.twitterDescription: Private access to the 2026 World Cup: matches, live scores, news, analysis and a prediction contest with friends.
metadata.ogImageAlt: Footballer in a red Canada kit celebrating a goal in a packed stadium.
metadata.sharedDescription: @{username}'s prediction on Lucarne, the 2026 World Cup prediction pool.

errors.updatingBody: A new version loaded — refreshing the page.
errors.errorBody: Something went wrong. Try again — if it persists, reload the page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This page doesn't exist or is no longer available. Head back to your dashboard.
